Second: Perform the ritual calibration of drop pod descent prep systems, ensuring trajectory alignment and deceleration matrices are sanctified.
Third: Chant the Hymn of Arrival as drop pod descent prep commences, that the Machine Spirits guide our descent through the void.
Fourth: Upon touchdown, offer gratitude to the Omnissiah for the successful execution of drop pod descent prep.
